ddls:
CREATE TABLE "material_samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material sample */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name of the material sample */,
  "material_type" INTEGER /* Type of material (e.g., steel, aluminum) */,
  "sample_description" TEXT /* Description of the material sample */,
  "date_collected" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "collected_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who collected the sample */,
  "test_condition" TEXT /* Specific test conditions under which the sample was analyzed */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was tested */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the sample was tested */,
  "tester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person who performed the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_samples_tester_id FOREIGN KEY ("tester_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_samples_material_type FOREIGN KEY ("material_type") REFERENCES material_types ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grid_subsets" (
  "subset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grid subset */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material sample the subset belongs to */,
  "coordinate_x" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of the subset */,
  "coordinate_y" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the subset */,
  "displacement_x" REAL /* Displacement in the X direction */,
  "displacement_y" REAL /* Displacement in the Y direction */,
  "sigma" REAL /* Sigma value (standard deviation of the displacement) */,
  "gamma" REAL /* Gamma value (related to the strain measurement) */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta value (related to the strain measurement) */,
  "status_flag" INTEGER /* Status flag indicating the validity of the subset data */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test the subset belongs to */,
  "test_condition" TEXT /* Specific test conditions for the subset */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Time when the measurements were taken */,
  "measurement_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the measurements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grid_subsets_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES material_samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grid_subsets_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES material_samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grid_subsets_status_flag FOREIGN KEY ("status_flag") REFERENCES quality_flags ("flag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strain_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strain measurement */,
  "subset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grid subset the measurement belongs to */,
  "vsg_strain_xx" REAL /* VSG strain in the XX direction */,
  "vsg_strain_yy" REAL /* VSG strain in the YY direction */,
  "vsg_strain_xy" REAL /* VSG strain in the XY direction */,
  "nlvc_strain_xx" REAL /* NLVC strain in the XX direction */,
  "nlvc_strain_yy" REAL /* NLVC strain in the YY direction */,
  "nlvc_strain_xy" REAL /* NLVC strain in the XY direction */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test the measurement belongs to */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Time when the strain measurements were taken */,
  "measurement_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the strain measurements */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used for strain measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strain_measurements_subset_id FOREIGN KEY ("subset_id") REFERENCES grid_subsets ("subset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strain_measurements_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES material_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material sample being accessed */,
  "subset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grid subset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Information about the device used for access */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the user's session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_subset_id FOREIGN KEY ("subset_id") REFERENCES grid_subsets ("subset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES material_samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_types" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material type */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material type */,
  "material_description" TEXT /* Description of the material type */,
  "chemical_composition" TEXT /* Chemical composition of the material */,
  "physical_properties" TEXT /* Physical properties of the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material sample the metadata belongs to */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata (e.g., thickness, temperature) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "metadata_type" TEXT /* Type of metadata (e.g., physical, chemical) */,
  "metadata_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metadata value */,
  "metadata_source" TEXT /* Source of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_metadata_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES material_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material sample the result belongs to */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., tensile strength, fatigue life) */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Value of the analysis result */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of the analysis result */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test the analysis belongs to */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis */,
  "analysis_instrument" TEXT /* Instrument used for the analysis */,
  "analysis_location" TEXT /* Location where the analysis was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES material_samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES material_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality flag */,
  "flag_name" TEXT /* Name of the quality flag */,
  "flag_description" TEXT /* Description of the quality flag */,
  "flag_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the quality flag (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "flag_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the quality flag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id")
)
